patent_family: Family B - ALG (Runtime Trust-Based Governance for Adaptive Systems)

figures.title: Six-Module Governance System Architecture
figures.mermaid_code:

Interface"] --> A102["102 - Observation
Module"] A102 --> A104["104 - Assessment
Module"] A104 --> A106["106 - Anticipation
Module"] A106 --> A108["108 - Modulation
Module"] A108 --> A110["110 - Enforcement

reference_numerals.624: Cryptographic Hash of Preceding Governance Record

figures.title: Phase State Machine with Configurable Thresholds
figures.mermaid_code:
%% FIG. 7 - Phase State Machine
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> s700
    s700: 700 - Nominal Phase
    s702: 702 - Constrained Phase
    s704: 704 - Frozen Phase
    s706: 706 - Rollback Phase
    s700 --> s702: 708 - Trust below configurable phase threshold
    s702 --> s700: Trust above configurable phase threshold
    s702 --> s704: 710 - Trust below frozen threshold
    s704 --> s702: Trust above frozen threshold
    s704 --> s706: 712 - Trust below configurable rollback threshold
    s706 --> s704: Rollback complete and state restored
